title: Mellow Savory Scottish Haggis Dumplings
description: A winey, aerated, nostalgic polish dish featuring haggis, score-fat, and low-glycemic-friendly ingredients, this recipe is a unique twist on traditional Scottish cuisine. It combines the richness of haggis with the comfort of dumplings.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine the haggis, score-fat, and egg, mixing until just combined.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the all-purpose flour, buckwheat flour, salt, and black pepper.
Add the dry ingredients to the haggis mixture and mix until a dough forms.
Gradually add the red wine and beef broth to the dough, mixing until it comes together in a sticky ball.
Knead the dough on a floured surface for 5 minutes, until it becomes smooth and elastic.
Divide the dough into 8 equal pieces and shape each into a dumpling.
Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and gently add the dumplings.
Reduce the heat to a simmer and cook the dumplings for 10 minutes, or until they float to the surface.
Remove the dumplings from the water with a slotted spoon and serve hot.
